events.name: breakthrough
events.description: Coding breakthrough: automated drone maintenance saves labor.

events.name: equipment_failure
events.description: Nuclear reactor scram — emergency power only for 30 sols.

events.name: cave_discovery
events.description: Underground cavern with stable temperature discovered.

subsim_log.expression: (let ((survival (+ (* food 0.3) (* water 0.3) (* power 0.2) (* air 0.2)))) (if (> survival 0.6) (+ survival 0.1) (- survival 0.2)))
(let ((survival (+ (* food 0.3) (* water 0.3) (* power 0.2) (* air 0.2)))) (if (> survival 0.6) (+ survival 0.1) (- survival 0.2)))

meta_awareness.insight: Rust Vega notices patterns in the dust storms that feel authored.
Luna Tide wonders why the colony history feels like it follows a script.
Ora Flame wonders why the colony history feels like it follows a script.
Coral Mist notices patterns in the dust storms that feel authored.
Moss Stone notices patterns in the dust storms that feel authored.
Coral Mist dreams of a vast interpreter evaluating their every choice.
